case_title: LAURO JAUREGUI VS. CHI TRI DANG et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAUREGUI, LAURO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANG, CHI TRI DANG, TUE $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $210.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,710.00, AGAINST BOTH DEFENDANTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JAUREGUI, LAURO AS TO DEFENDANT DANG, CHI TRI DANG, TUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF *CHANGE OF ADDRESS OF THE DEFENDANT. ** AND DEFENDANT HAVE NOT YET BEEN SERVED. REQUESTING A NEW COURT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAUREGUI, LAURO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE IS $ 90.00 - SERVED JUN-14-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DANG, TUE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DANG, CHI TRI DANG, TUE
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-30-2012 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-02-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT DEFENDANT CHI TRI DANG.DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MARK FRANKLIN-VIETNAMES INTERPRETER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID MCDONALD. FILED BY JAUREGUI, LAURO DANG, TUE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2012 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF JAUREGUI, LAURO ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE IS $ 45.00 - SERVED JUN-11-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DANG, CHI TRI
